item.title: 0.1 Beta 4
item.description:
Habitat Version 0.1 Beta 4

What's New & Improved

  • Improved: 4 finger tap reliability.
  • Added: Button hover states for license activation steps.
  • Added: Dark mode forced theme. Might work on a light mode later.
  • Fixed: Toggles not sliding properly in settings.
  • Fixed: Information i’s showing popup behind menubar inside tools menus.
  • Fixed: Boa virus scanner not properly working.
  • Fixed: Squeak default mouse functions if mouse button isn’t bound in squeak.
  • Fixed: Hoo map zooming in every time an endpoint was clicked or cleared.
  • Fixed: Tool icon sizes on intro description page.

More to come.
— Thank you for all the support feedback!
